requirementCueLines: Suggested First- and Second-Year Courses: English composition; ATMOS 220; MATH 124, MATH 125, MATH 126; PHYS 121, PHYS 122, PHYS 123. The first upper-division core course is ATMOS 301, which is offered autumn quarter only. Any lower-division atmospheric sciences courses except ATMOS 220 count as electives and not as part of the major.
Minimum course requirements: English composition; MATH 124, MATH 125, MATH 126 (or MATH 134, MATH 135, MATH 136); PHYS 121, PHYS 122, PHYS 123 (or PHYS 141, PHYS 142, PHYS 143)
Grade requirements: Minimum 2.0 grade for each course required for admission; minimum 2.50 cumulative GPA in courses required for admission
